description: A bust-length portrait of a young man with long, dark, windswept hair falling past his shoulders. He has angular features, a furrowed brow, and a sorrowful or troubled expression. He wears a dark garment only partially visible at the neckline. The background is soft and hazy with blue and golden tones suggesting an outdoor setting. The painting is signed in the lower right corner. The brushwork is realistic with careful attention to the emotional expression.
